name: dotdotgod-workspace
description: Workspace for dotdotgod project memory packages across Pi, docs validation, Claude Code, and Codex adapters.

scripts.verify: npm run verify:generated && npm --workspaces run verify --if-present
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm run verify:generated && npm --workspaces run pack:dry-run --if-present
scripts.publish:all: npm publish -w @dotdotgod/docs-validator --access public && npm publish -w @dotdotgod/pi --access public && npm publish -w @dotdotgod/claude-code --access public && npm publish -w @dotdotgod/codex --access public
